main.name: Szarekh, the Silent King
main.oracle_text:
Flying
My Will Be Done — Whenever Szarekh attacks, mill three cards. You may put an artifact creature card or Vehicle card from among the cards milled this way into your hand.

card.name: Solemn Simulacrum
card.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
When this creature dies, you may draw a card.

card.name: Animate Dead
card.oracle_text:
Enchant creature card in a graveyard
When this Aura enters, if it's on the battlefield, it loses "enchant creature card in a graveyard" and gains "enchant creature put onto the battlefield with this Aura." Return enchanted creature card to the battlefield under your control and attach this Aura to it. When this Aura leaves the battlefield, that creature's controller sacrifices it.
Enchanted creature gets -1/-0.

card.name: Mycosynth Golem
card.oracle_text:
Affinity for artifacts (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each artifact you control.)
Artifact creature spells you cast have affinity for artifacts. (They cost {1} less to cast for each artifact you control.)

card.name: Shizo, Death's Storehouse
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {B}.
{B}, {T}: Target legendary creature gains fear until end of turn. (It can't be blocked except by artifact creatures and/or black creatures.)
card.flavor_text: Centuries ago, Shizo was a verdant field of wildflowers. After 891 samurai died in a single battle on its grasses, it became a haunted moor.

card.name: Crypt Ghast
card.oracle_text:
Extort (Whenever you cast a spell, you may pay {W/B}. If you do, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain that much life.)
Whenever you tap a Swamp for mana, add an additional {B}.

card.name: Entomb
card.oracle_text: Search your library for a card, put that card into your graveyard, then shuffle.
card.flavor_text:
"I'll return once you've ripened."
—Ghoulcaller Gisa

card.name: Myr Retriever
card.oracle_text: When this creature dies, return another target artifact card from your graveyard to your hand.
card.flavor_text: Mephidross gives up treasure easily . . . as long as you take its place.

card.name: Yawgmoth's Will
card.oracle_text:
Until end of turn, you may play lands and cast spells from your graveyard.
If a card would be put into your graveyard from anywhere this turn, exile that card instead.

card.name: Shadowspear
card.flavor_text: A weapon of darkness for a warrior of light.

card.name: Toxic Deluge
card.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay X life.
All creatures get -X/-X until end of turn.
card.flavor_text: Armor dissolved into flesh. Flesh melted to bone. Bone fell away to nothing.

card.name: Phyrexian Tower
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}, Sacrifice a creature: Add {B}{B}.
card.flavor_text:
"Yawgmoth is dead, and his citadels lie empty. But there will always be some who seek power at any price."
—Karn

card.name: Reanimate
card.oracle_text: Put target creature card from a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control. You lose life equal to that card's mana value.
card.flavor_text:
"You'd better be worth it."
—Liliana Vess

card.name: Volrath's Stronghold
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{1}{B}, {T}: Put target creature card from your graveyard on top of your library.
card.flavor_text: The seed of a world's evil.

card.name: Grave Pact
card.oracle_text: Whenever a creature you control dies, each other player sacrifices a creature of their choice.
card.flavor_text:
"The bonds of loyalty can tie one to the grave."
—Crovax, ascendant evincar

card.name: Nykthos, Shrine to Nyx
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{2}, {T}: Choose a color. Add an amount of mana of that color equal to your devotion to that color. (Your devotion to a color is the number of mana symbols of that color in the mana costs of permanents you control.)

card.name: Filth
card.oracle_text:
Swampwalk (This creature can't be blocked as long as defending player controls a Swamp.)
As long as this card is in your graveyard and you control a Swamp, creatures you control have swampwalk.
card.flavor_text:
"As the portal closed, Filth oozed through. The stench of evil followed it in."
—*Scroll of Beginnings*

card.name: Metalworker
card.oracle_text: {T}: Reveal any number of artifact cards in your hand. Add {C}{C} for each card revealed this way.
card.flavor_text:
"At this rate I fully expect to be replaced by a clockwork golem by year's end."
—Barrin

card_faces.name: Malakir Rebirth
card_faces.oracle_text: Choose target creature. You lose 2 life. Until end of turn, that creature gains "When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control."
card_faces.flavor_text:
"Those who fail to escape Malakir become part of the city's defense."
—Doros, expedition guide

card_faces.name: Malakir Mire
card_faces.flavor_text:
"Getting into Malakir isn't difficult. It's getting out that's the hard part."
—Doros, expedition guide

card_faces.name: Agadeem's Awakening
card_faces.oracle_text: Return from your graveyard to the battlefield any number of target creature cards that each have a different mana value X or less.
card_faces.flavor_text:
"Now is the death-hour, just before dawn. Wake, sleepers, and haunt the living!"
—Vivias, Witch Vessel

card_faces.name: Agadeem, the Undercrypt
card_faces.oracle_text:
As this land enters, you may pay 3 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.
{T}: Add {B}.
card_faces.flavor_text:
"Here below the hedron fields, souls and secrets lie entombed."
—Vivias, Witch Vessel

card.name: Armix, Filigree Thrasher
card.oracle_text:
Whenever Armix attacks, you may discard a card. When you do, target creature defending player controls gets -X/-X until end of turn, where X is the number of artifacts you control plus the number of artifact cards in your graveyard.
Partner (You can have two commanders if both have partner.)

card.name: Urza's Saga
card.oracle_text:
(As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.)
I — This Saga gains "{T}: Add {C}."
II — This Saga gains "{2}, {T}: Create a 0/0 colorless Construct artifact creature token with 'This token gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control.'"
III — Search your library for an artifact card with mana cost {0} or {1}, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: The Meathook Massacre
card.oracle_text:
When The Meathook Massacre enters, each creature gets -X/-X until end of turn.
Whenever a creature you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life.
Whenever a creature an opponent controls dies, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Darksteel Citadel
card.oracle_text:
Indestructible
{T}: Add {C}.

card.name: Takenuma, Abandoned Mire
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {B}.
Channel — {3}{B}, Discard this card: Mill three cards, then return a creature or planeswalker card from your graveyard to your hand. This ability costs {1} less to activate for each legendary creature you control.

card.name: Nim Deathmantle
Arcane Signet
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.
card.flavor_text: All Necrons bear the mark of the Triarch, a brand upon their living-metal skin that binds them to their dynasty.

card.name: Trazyn the Infinite
card.oracle_text:
Deathtouch
Prismatic Gallery — As long as Trazyn is on the battlefield, it has all activated abilities of all artifact cards in your graveyard.
card.flavor_text: The Archaeovist of the Solemnace Galleries will not rest until every treasure in the galaxy is safely within his clutches.

card.name: Biotransference
card.oracle_text:
Creatures you control are artifacts in addition to their other types. The same is true for creature spells you control and creature cards you own that aren't on the battlefield.
Whenever you cast an artifact spell, you lose 1 life and create a 2/2 black Necron Warrior artifact creature token.

card.name: Illuminor Szeras
card.oracle_text: Secrets of the Soul — {T}, Sacrifice another creature: Add an amount of {B} equal to the sacrificed creature's mana value.
card.flavor_text: "Immortality is not quite the same as invulnerability, but it is close enough."

card.name: Cryptek
card.oracle_text: {1}{B}, {T}: Choose another target artifact creature you control. When that creature dies this turn, return it to the battlefield tapped under your control.
card.flavor_text: There are those who draw false comparisons between the tech-magi of the Adeptus Mechanicus and the xenotechnologists of the necron race. There can be no mercy for such heretics.

card.name: Anrakyr the Traveller
card.oracle_text: Lord of the Pyrrhian Legions — Whenever Anrakyr the Traveller attacks, you may cast an artifact spell from your hand or graveyard by paying life equal to its mana value rather than paying its mana cost.
card.flavor_text: "Though it may take an eternity, I will see the myriad dynasties united once more."

card.name: Their Number Is Legion
card.oracle_text:
Create X tapped 2/2 black Necron Warrior artifact creature tokens, then you gain life equal to the number of artifacts you control. Exile Their Number Is Legion.
You may cast this card from your graveyard.

card.name: Cryptothrall
card.oracle_text: Protector — Other artifact creatures you control have hexproof.
card.flavor_text: Bound to a cryptek, the cryptothrall exists for one reason: to defend its master to the death.

card.name: Canoptek Spyder
card.oracle_text:
Flying
Fabricator Claw Array — Whenever another nontoken artifact creature or Vehicle you control enters, draw a card.

card.name: Lokhust Heavy Destroyer
card.oracle_text:
Flying
Enmitic Exterminator — When this creature enters, each player sacrifices a creature of their choice.
Unearth {5}{B}{B}{B} ({5}{B}{B}{B}: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield. It gains haste. Exile it at the beginning of the next end step or if it would leave the battlefield. Unearth only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Chronomancer
card.oracle_text:
Flying
Atomic Transmutation — {1}, {T}, Sacrifice another artifact: Draw a card.
Unearth {2}{B} ({2}{B}: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield. It gains haste. Exile it at the beginning of the next end step or if it would leave the battlefield. Unearth only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Tomb Fortress
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {B}.
{2}{B}{B}{B}, {T}, Exile this land: Mill four cards, then return a creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Their Name Is Death
card.oracle_text: Destroy all nonartifact creatures.
card.flavor_text:
"When the Silent King saw what had been done, he knew at last the true nature of the C'tan, and the doom they had wrought in his name."
—*The Book of Mournful Night*

card.name: Skorpekh Lord
card.oracle_text:
Menace
Command Protocols — Other artifact creatures you control get +1/+0 and have menace.
Unearth {2}{B} ({2}{B}: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield. It gains haste. Exile it at the beginning of the next end step or if it would leave the battlefield. Unearth only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Shard of the Void Dragon
card.oracle_text:
Flying
Spear of the Void Dragon — Whenever this creature attacks, each opponent sacrifices a nonland permanent of their choice.
Matter Absorption — Whenever an artifact is put into a graveyard from the battlefield or is put into exile from the battlefield, put two +1/+1 counters on this creature.

card.name: Dread Return
card.oracle_text:
Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.
Flashback—Sacrifice three creatures. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)
card.flavor_text:
"Bolters, flamers, plasma—we hit the xenos with everything, and it just kept coming."
—Captain Uriel Ventris

card.name: Mind Stone
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.
card.flavor_text: During biotransference, the Necrontyr lost almost all individuality. What little remained was imprisoned within a living metal form.

card.name: Living Death
card.oracle_text: Each player exiles all creature cards from their graveyard, then sacrifices all creatures they control, then puts all cards they exiled this way onto the battlefield.

card.name: Cranial Plating
card.flavor_text: The flesh of the Necrontyr is a memory so distant as to be nearly mythical.

card.name: Caged Sun
card.oracle_text:
As this artifact enters, choose a color.
Creatures you control of the chosen color get +1/+1.
Whenever a land's ability causes you to add one or more mana of the chosen color, add an additional one mana of that color.

card.name: Defile
card.oracle_text: Target creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn for each Swamp you control.
card.flavor_text:
"Agresto, bring up the rear . . . Agresto?"
—Sergeant Dremark Eigen, last words

card.name: Reaver Titan
card.oracle_text:
Void Shields — Protection from mana value 3 or less
Gatling Blaster — Whenever this Vehicle attacks, it deals 5 damage to each opponent.
Crew 4 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 4 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

card.name: Sculpting Steel
card.oracle_text: You may have this artifact enter as a copy of any artifact on the battlefield.
card.flavor_text: Necrodermis, the living metal from which all Necrons are made, is endlessly adaptive.

card.name: Vault of Whispers
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add {B}.
card.flavor_text: Heretic cultists came to the planet Sovereign in search of resources and precious artifacts. They found something else.

card.name: Ashnod's Altar
card.oracle_text: Sacrifice a creature: Add {C}{C}.
card.flavor_text:
"If you work at sawing up carcasses, you notice how the joints fit, how the nerves are arrayed, and how the skin peels back."
—Ashnod, to Tawnos

card.name: Urza's Workshop
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
Metalcraft — {T}: Add {C} for each Urza's land you control. Activate only if you control three or more artifacts.
card.flavor_text: Urza eventually came to understand Tocasia's lessons on clarity of purpose. Perfection became his goal, and all other matters fell away in its pursuit.

card.name: Scrap Trawler
card.oracle_text: Whenever this creature dies or another artifact you control is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, return to your hand target artifact card in your graveyard with lesser mana value.

card.name: Victimize
card.oracle_text: Choose two target creature cards in your graveyard. Sacrifice a creature. If you do, return the chosen cards to the battlefield tapped.
card.flavor_text:
"Die. But die knowing that your pathetic life will yield a great bounty for me."
—Zul Ashur, lich lord

card.name: Black Sun's Twilight
card.oracle_text: Up to one target creature gets -X/-X until end of turn. If X is 5 or more, return a creature card with mana value X or less from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.
card.flavor_text:
"Where once there was complacence, Sheoldred brought ambition, and soon the will of Yawgmoth reigned."
—Monument inscription

card.name: Blightsteel Colossus
card.oracle_text:
Trample, infect, indestructible
If Blightsteel Colossus would be put into a graveyard from anywhere, reveal Blightsteel Colossus and shuffle it into its owner's library instead.

card.set_name: March of the Machine: The Aftermath
card.name: Karn, Legacy Reforged
card.oracle_text:
Karn's power and toughness are each equal to the greatest mana value among artifacts you control.
At the beginning of your upkeep, add {C} for each artifact you control. This mana can't be spent to cast nonartifact spells. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end.

card.name: Bojuka Bog
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, exile target player's graveyard.
{T}: Add {B}.
card.flavor_text: There loomed against the westward stars a dark black shape: a great barrow stood there.

card.set_name: The Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth
card.name: Palantír of Orthanc
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of your end step, put an influence counter on Palantír of Orthanc and scry 2. Then target opponent may have you draw a card. If that player doesn't, you mill X cards, where X is the number of influence counters on Palantír of Orthanc, and that player loses life equal to the total mana value of those cards.

card.name: Urborg, Tomb of Yawgmoth
card.oracle_text: Each land is a Swamp in addition to its other land types.
card.flavor_text:
"All dead, all rotten. Elves and Men and Orcs. There was a great battle here long ago, yes."
—Gollum

card.name: Cabal Coffers
card.oracle_text: {2}, {T}: Add {B} for each Swamp you control.
card.flavor_text:
"Evil things came forth, and they took Minas Ithil and abode in it, and they made it into a place of dread; it is now called Minas Morgul, the Tower of Sorcery."
—Elrond

card.name: Sol Ring
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}{C}.
card.flavor_text:
"Model? I'm insulted. It's by all reasonable metrics a fully functional planetary system, scaled down for easier study."
—Urza, to Tawnos

card.name: Foundry Inspector
card.oracle_text: Artifact spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.
card.flavor_text: Automaton inspectors ensure that the Consulate's stringent standards for mass production are upheld.

card_faces.name: Virtue of Persistence
card_faces.oracle_text: At the beginning of your upkeep, put target creature card from a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control.

card_faces.name: Locthwain Scorn
card_faces.oracle_text: Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn. You gain 2 life.

card.name: Cyberman Patrol
card.oracle_text: Artifact creatures you control have afflict 3. (Whenever a creature with afflict 3 becomes blocked, defending player loses 3 life.)
card.flavor_text: "Obey or you will be destroyed."

card.name: Cybermen Squadron
card.oracle_text: Nonlegendary artifact creatures you control have myriad. (Whenever a creature with myriad attacks, for each opponent other than defending player, you may create a token copy that's tapped and attacking that player or a planeswalker they control. Exile the tokens at end of combat.)

card.name: Rogue's Passage
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{4}, {T}: Target creature can't be blocked this turn.
card.flavor_text: The Railroad is an organization dedicated to freeing synths from the influence of the Institute. Their HQ is a secret location found by following the Freedom Trail.

card.name: Deadly Dispute
card.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice an artifact or creature.
Draw two cards and create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
card.flavor_text:
"You go break up that bar brawl yet? People are gonna get hurt unless you step in."
—Sheriff Marion

card.name: Eviscerator's Insight
card.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice an artifact or creature.
Draw two cards.
Flashback {4}{B} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost and any additional costs. Then exile it.)
card.flavor_text: "We're all just the sum of our parts."

card.name: Ripples of Undeath
card.oracle_text: At the beginning of your first main phase, mill three cards. Then you may pay {1} and 3 life. If you do, put a card from among those cards into your hand.
card.flavor_text: As the monster lay dying, it stared into the eyes of the human who slew it. Decades later, it has yet to break its gaze.

card.name: Junk Diver
card.oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature dies, return another target artifact card from your graveyard to your hand.
card.flavor_text: Garbage in, treasure out.

card.name: Urza's Mine
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}. If you control an Urza's Power-Plant and an Urza's Tower, add {C}{C} instead.
card.flavor_text: In his hunger for power and knowledge, Urza dug deep into Dominaria's ancient past.

card.name: Urza's Tower
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}. If you control an Urza's Mine and an Urza's Power-Plant, add {C}{C}{C} instead.
card.flavor_text: Urza studied the creations of the Thran not simply to learn from them, but to surpass them.

card.name: Urza's Power Plant
card.oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}. If you control an Urza's Mine and an Urza's Tower, add {C}{C} instead.
card.flavor_text: Urza threw himself into his research, pushing the boundaries of both possibility and morality.

Indestructible
Whenever this creature attacks, blocks, or becomes the target of a spell, it deals damage equal to its power to each opponent.
{5}: Monstrosity 5. (If this creature isn't monstrous, put five +1/+1 counters on it and it becomes monstrous.)

card.name: Blood Artist
card.oracle_text: Whenever this creature or another creature dies, target player loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
card.flavor_text:
"Vanya Falkenrath's paintings are astonishing. How does she manage to achieve such rich crimson hues?"
—Stefan, art critic

card.name: Braids, Arisen Nightmare

card.name: Phyrexian Reclamation
card.oracle_text: {1}{B}, Pay 2 life: Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

tokens.name: On an Adventure
tokens.oracle_text: After an Adventure resolves, you can place the exiled card here. You may cast the creature from exile.

tokens.name: Poison Counter
tokens.oracle_text: (A player with ten or more poison counters loses the game.)

tokens.name: Their Number Is Legion
tokens.oracle_text:
Create X tapped 2/2 black Necron Warrior artifact creature tokens, then you gain life equal to the number of artifacts you control. Exile Their Number Is Legion.
You may cast this card from your graveyard.

tokens.name: Treasure
tokens.oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.

tokens.name: Treasure
tokens.oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.

tokens.name: Urza's Construction Drone
tokens.oracle_text:
When Urza's Construction Drone enters, conjure cards named Urza's Mine, Urza's Power Plant, and Urza's Tower into your library, then shuffle.
Whenever Urza's Construction Drone attacks or dies, seek an Urza's land card.

tokens.name: Urza's Mine
tokens.oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}. If you control an Urza's Power-Plant and an Urza's Tower, add {C}{C} instead.
tokens.flavor_text: In his hunger for power and knowledge, Urza dug deep into Dominaria's ancient past.

tokens.name: Urza's Power Plant
tokens.oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}. If you control an Urza's Mine and an Urza's Tower, add {C}{C} instead.
tokens.flavor_text: Urza threw himself into his research, pushing the boundaries of both possibility and morality.

tokens.name: Urza's Saga
tokens.oracle_text:
(As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.)
I — This Saga gains "{T}: Add {C}."
II — This Saga gains "{2}, {T}: Create a 0/0 colorless Construct artifact creature token with 'This token gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control.'"
III — Search your library for an artifact card with mana cost {0} or {1}, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

tokens.name: Urza's Tower
tokens.oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}. If you control an Urza's Mine and an Urza's Power-Plant, add {C}{C}{C} instead.
tokens.flavor_text: Urza studied the creations of the Thran not simply to learn from them, but to surpass them.
